info.title: House Price Prediction API
info.description: House Price Prediction backend API schema for frontend integration.

post.description:
Run one or more registered scenarios through the full audit pipeline.

Pass ``scenario_ids`` to select a subset; omit (or send ``null``) to run
all registered scenarios.

ScenarioBatchPipelineRequest.title: ScenarioBatchPipelineRequest
ScenarioBatchPipelineRequest.description: Request to run a subset (or all) registered scenarios through the pipeline.

ScenarioBatchPipelineResponse.title: ScenarioBatchPipelineResponse
ScenarioBatchPipelineResponse.description: Aggregated result of a scenario batch pipeline run.

ScenarioPipelineResult.title: ScenarioPipelineResult
ScenarioPipelineResult.description: Result of running one registered scenario through the full audit pipeline.
